Our Services

End-to-end document authentication and compliance support across Asia and beyond.

Federal & State Background Checks

Criminal record checks and identity verification from the United States, Canada, UK, Australia, and other jurisdictions.

Apostille & Document Authentication

Hague Apostille certification, Embassy / Consulate legalization, and notarization for degrees, teaching certificates, marriage licenses, and corporate documents.

Local China PCC Reports (Police Clearance)

Police Clearance Certificates (PCC) from Public Security Bureau offices in Beijing, Shanghai, Shenzhen, and other Chinese cities.

Fingerprinting Solutions

Fast, convenient, and accurate fingerprinting solutions in Shanghai, Beijing, Chengdu and other major cities across China.

Learn more →

China Visa & Work Permit Assistance

End-to-end document preparation and guidance for China Z-Visa applications and Residence Permit documentation.

China Business Registration

From WFOE and JV setup to post-registration compliance, we help foreign companies establish a legal entity in China.

Ancillary Services

Back-office operational support — HR, payroll, finance, tax compliance, and office selection.

Trusted Worldwide

James Whitfield
International School HR Director

Four Steps to Compliance

From consultation to delivery — a seamless process

Step 1

Free Consultation

Share your destination country, document types, and timeline. We will map out the exact authentication path and provide a transparent, all-in quote.

Step 2

Document Collection

Send us your documents via secure courier or digital upload. We verify each file for completeness and flag any issues before submission.

Step 3

Authentication & Verification

We handle notarization, apostille, and embassy or consulate legalization — managing every step with tracked submissions and real-time status updates.

Step 4

Global Delivery

Your fully authenticated documents are delivered to you anywhere in the world via secure tracked courier — or collected in person from our Shanghai office.

Permanent Residence

The Complete Guide to FBI Background Checks for China's 5-Star Permanent Residence Card (五星卡) — 2026

American applicants for China's new 5-Star Permanent Residence Card (五星卡) must submit an FBI Identity History Summary Check with a US Department of State apostille. Here's the exact process, timeline, and how to avoid common delays.

June 20267 min read

Regulatory Intelligence

Strategic Compliance: Navigating Document Legalization for the China-Vietnam Corridor in 2026
